_source.note: Positive candidate fixture — grok-4.5 xAI review P1-A1 fix (2026-07-13). Previous revision used c1_airControl_000002 (intent=open_ac_set_interface) with mounted_tool_name=adjust_ac_temperature_to_number, which violated the D-domain paradigm (docs/c5-recovery-2026-06-22/grill-decisions-amend-paradigm-tool-surface.md:13 'intent == 工具名') — surface binding was fake. Now uses the real jsonl row where intent==mounted_tool_name: c1_airControl_000164 (grep-verified 2026-07-13; adjacent rows _000165/_000166 share the same intent but differ in slot/action_code). All action_candidate fields (intent/service/device/action_primitive/action_code/slot/slot_keys/value) are verbatim from that jsonl row. trace_digest computed via RouteCanonicalJSON.sha256Hex over the extended load-bearing set that now includes action_candidate_summary (grok-4.5 review P1-B2 fix).
